alertsDesc: Enter your email and optionally your WhatsApp number.
guideHello: Hello! I'm your Suisse Alert guide. Follow these quick steps.
guideStepCategory: Start by choosing housing or jobs.
guideStepSearch: Use the search bar at the top for a city or neighbourhood.
guideStepMap: The map follows your results — great for seeing where listings are.
guideStepAlerts: Create an account in Account: QR, email, and reply OK on WhatsApp to confirm.
guideStepDone: You're set! Reopen this guide anytime from the button.
consentLabel: I accept the privacy policy and terms of service
consentRequired: Please accept the privacy policy and terms.
alertSuccess: Alert enabled! You will receive new listings.
alertErrorGeneric: Could not enable the alert. Please try again later.
accountLoginHint: Create an account in the Account tab to enable alerts.
accountSignupDesc: Sign up to receive housing and job alerts.
alertsGoToAccount: Create an account in Account to enable your alerts.
verifySuccess: Email confirmed — your alerts are active.
verifySuccessWhatsapp: WhatsApp confirmed — your alerts are active.
alertCheckEmail: Check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
alertCheckWhatsapp: Open WhatsApp: tap the confirmation link, or reply OK.
whatsappVerifyHint: With a WhatsApp number, you get a link and can also reply OK to confirm.
qrDesc: Open this link on your phone to create an account. On a local network, set VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL.
